mapper.sql: select route_id, route_name, robot_id, map_id, point_ids, point_count, status, tenant_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sys_tour_route
mapper.select: SELECT sr.route_id, sr.route_name, sr.robot_id, sr.map_id, sr.status, sr.point_count, sr.point_ids, sr.create_by, sr.create_time, sr.update_by, sr.update_time, rp.id as rp_id, rp.route_id as rp_route_id, rp.point_id as rp_point_id, rp.content_id as rp_content_id, rp.order_num as rp_order_num, sp.point_id, sp.point_name, sp.point_code, sp.point_type, sp.coordinate_x, sp.coordinate_y, sp.status as point_status, tc.content_id, tc.point_name as content_point_name, tc.point_desc, tc.broadcast_type, tc.broadcast_text, tc.audio_file, tc.voice_type, tc.speech_rate, tc.interval_time, tc.arm_action, tc.chassis_angle FROM sys_tour_route sr LEFT JOIN sys_route_point rp ON sr.route_id = rp.route_id LEFT JOIN sys_point sp ON rp.point_id = sp.point_id LEFT JOIN sys_tour_content tc ON rp.content_id = tc.content_id WHERE sr.robot_id = #{robotId} ORDER BY sr.route_id, rp.order_num ASC

SELECT sr.route_id, sr.route_name, sr.robot_id, sr.map_id, sr.status, sr.point_count, sr.point_ids, sr.create_by, sr.create_time, sr.update_by, sr.update_time, rp.id as rp_id, rp.route_id as rp_route_id, rp.point_id as rp_point_id, rp.content_id as rp_content_id, rp.order_num as rp_order_num, sp.point_id, sp.point_name, sp.point_code, sp.point_type, sp.coordinate_x, sp.coordinate_y, sp.status as point_status, tc.content_id, tc.point_name as content_point_name, tc.point_desc, tc.broadcast_type, tc.broadcast_text, tc.audio_file, tc.voice_type, tc.speech_rate, tc.interval_time, tc.arm_action, tc.chassis_angle FROM sys_tour_route sr LEFT JOIN sys_route_point rp ON sr.route_id = rp.route_id LEFT JOIN sys_point sp ON rp.point_id = sp.point_id LEFT JOIN sys_tour_content tc ON rp.content_id = tc.content_id WHERE sr.route_id = #{routeId} ORDER BY rp.order_num ASC
mapper.insert: insert into sys_tour_route ( route_name, robot_id, map_id, point_ids, point_count, status, tenant_id, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{routeName}, #{robotId}, #{mapId}, #{pointIds}, #{pointCount}, #{status}, #{tenantId}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select id, route_id, point_id, content_id, order_num from sys_route_point where route_id = #{routeId} order by order_num
mapper.insert: insert into sys_route_point (route_id, point_id, content_id, order_num) values (#{routeId}, #{pointId}, #{contentId}, #{orderNum})

insert into sys_route_point (route_id, point_id, content_id, order_num) values
(#{routeId}, #{point.pointId}, #{point.contentId}, #{point.orderNum})
